ocr_findings.description: Source attribution label rendered as '説明' in OCR ('説明 https://www.ipa.go.jp/...'); image shows '出所' (meaning: source/reference). Different word with related but distinct meaning; cosmetic for a URL citation.
'本章はココ！' arrow annotation and decorative column tab (第7章 プロジェクトマネジメント sidebar) are not captured as text; these are graphical overlays on the table with no separate text block in the OCR.

reviewer_notes: Chapter 8 title page for サービスマネジメントとシステム監査 with chapter overview paragraph, learning objectives bullet list, and exam-scope positioning table. This is clearly a chapter_title page: large heading, brief intro, bullet summary, no substantial body learning content. Table structure is correctly reproduced.
